Necklace.description: Neck jewellery worn around the neck

templates.name: Choker
templates.placement: sits tight around the neck base

templates.name: Stud
templates.model_pose: three-quarter face turn, hair swept back

templates.name: Chandelier
templates.model_pose: face forward, chin up, hair pinned up

templates.name: Charm Anklet
templates.model_pose: walking pose or seated showing anklet

Jewellery Set.description: A complete matching jewellery set worn together — necklace with earrings, and optionally other matching pieces

templates.name: Necklace + Drop Earrings Set
templates.placement: necklace rests on collarbone/chest; matching drop earrings hang from both earlobes simultaneously
templates.size_hint: necklace 43-70cm at chest; earrings 3-7cm drop from lobes — both pieces must be equally visible
templates.model_pose: front-facing, chin slightly up, hair pinned up or swept back to fully expose ears and neck, upper body portrait shot
templates.set_instruction: BOTH the necklace AND the earrings from the reference image must appear on the model simultaneously. The necklace sits on the chest/neck and the matching earrings are visible on both ears. Do not omit either piece.

templates.name: Necklace + Stud Earrings Set
templates.placement: necklace at collarbone; small stud earrings on both earlobes
templates.size_hint: necklace 43-50cm; studs 4-10mm at lobe center — ensure ear area is well-lit to show studs
templates.model_pose: front-facing or slight three-quarter turn, hair swept back, upper body shot showing neck and ears
templates.set_instruction: BOTH pieces must be visible: the necklace prominently on the chest/neck AND the small stud earrings on each ear. Ensure lighting highlights both earlobes. Do not omit either piece.

templates.name: Necklace + Earrings + Bracelet Set
templates.placement: necklace on chest; earrings on both ears; bracelet on wrist — all three visible
templates.size_hint: necklace mid-chest; earrings as per design; bracelet 17-20cm wrist
templates.model_pose: three-quarter body shot, one wrist raised to display bracelet, face slightly turned to show earrings, hair up
templates.set_instruction: ALL THREE matching pieces must be shown: necklace on neck/chest, earrings on both ears, and bracelet on the wrist. Compose the shot to make all three pieces visible. Do not omit any piece.

templates.name: Chandelier Earrings + Statement Necklace Set
templates.placement: bold statement necklace on chest; dramatic chandelier earrings on both ears
templates.size_hint: necklace 50-70cm, prominent; earrings 5-10cm elaborate drop — both pieces large and dramatic
templates.model_pose: front-facing, chin up, hair pinned completely up to fully reveal dramatic earrings, upper body portrait
templates.set_instruction: BOTH the dramatic necklace AND the chandelier earrings must appear together on the model. Hair must be fully up. Both pieces should be equally prominent in the frame. Do not render only one piece.
